title: The Steel Cage
writer: Oliver Crawford, Walter Doniger, Clinton T. Duffy
actors: Paul Kelly, Maureen O'Sullivan, Walter Slezak
plot: Warden Clinton T. Duffy of San Quentin penitentiary introduces three short stories about prison life: Prisoner Billy Brenner, a gourmet, is dismayed to discover that Louis, the prison's head chef, is about to be paroled and offers...
